nasb.text: But the Jews who disbelieved stirred up the minds of the Gentiles and embittered them against the brethren.

esv.text: But the unbelieving Jews stirred up the Gentiles and poisoned their minds against the brothers.

cnv.text: 但不順從的猶太人，煽動外族人，激起他們仇恨的心，來反對弟兄們。

ccb.text: 但那些顽梗不信的犹太人却怂恿外族人敌视信徒。

csbs.text: 但那些不肯信从的犹太人怂恿外邦人，使他们心里敌视弟兄们。
